posts.text:
🚨Sharp Money Tracker🚨
Just a few minutes from puck drop tonight. 15 games, a lot of value.. if you haven’t seen the tool. You’re in for a treat.
We’re monitoring the top bettors on prediction markets, organizing the data so you can see where their action is..
Lets catch fire tonight!!
Drop your plays below, I love a good sweat.
Enable hls playback
[Download video](https://nitter.net/video/CECC87923142E/https%3A%2F%2Fvideo.twimg.com%2Famplify_video%2F2036572394190512128%2Fvid%2Favc1%2F828x1792%2Fo5nGnjy_y3WNWtVI.mp4 "Download video")

Brazil ✅. 
> Soccer card's 11-4 this week.
> Germany kicks off in 45 minutes....our biggest play left on the board.
> ❤️ = tail the run with us
🔁 = you're fading, you think it ends here
> The timeline goes on record before the whistle.

Nobody's betting the Athletics this afternoon...
 No city, no stars, and they lost yesterday
> But we don't track the public...we track the wallets that actually win. Every proven winner on this game is on the A's. Not one is fading.
> Same model that's 13-5 on its top plays. 
> A's ML 
> Tell me I'm crazy. 👇

Before first pitch, I want your answer on this!
> Cubs/Brewers 8.5
Over or under?
> Reply with your pick before you read any further.
> This is the strongest play on our board today.
Every sharp wallet we track landed the same way:
> • $19.1K on one side
• 100% sharp money
• zero dissent
• highest-conviction read of the day
> First pitch: 2:11 ET.

A major sharp bettor we have been tracking just made two moves this afternoon.
We're on both. 🐋
Today he loaded:
• Reds/Pirates UNDER 9.5
• Marlins +1.5 and at 3× his usual bet size
Two tickets. Both on our card.
Riding with the whale? 🐋

Sharp money just poured $207K into a game you've never heard of. ⚽
Uzbekistan vs DR Congo...kicks in ~1 minutes.
• $207K on DR Congo: 79% of every sharp dollar in the match
• 8 proven wallets, led by a +$571K winner who dropped $105K
• The other side? $28K. It's not close.
DR Congo ML -150 (4u). Every wallet is live on the site before kickoff
Tailing the unknown, or fading it? 🎯

Massive slate tonight.
And honestly, that’s exactly what we needed.
Loaded card
England ML (5u)
Argentina ML (4u)
Jays ML (4u)
Mets ML (4u)
Reds ML (4u)
Marlins +1.5 (4u)
Congo ML (4u)
Croatia ML (3u)
Brewers ML (3u)
Royals ML (1u)
This is a volume card.
What’s your favorite play on the board?

Two MLB plays this afternoon...and on both, the sharp money is unanimous.
100% on one side. Zero dollars on the other. ⚾
Under 8.5 Astros/Tigers (-104)
• $24.5K sharp money · 4 proven winners
• One sharp loaded 3.6× their usual size
• First pitch 1:11 ET — last call
Blue Jays ML -178
• $19.9K sharp money · zero dissent
• Led by a +$231K proven winner ($17.9K of it)
Tailing the unders, the Jays, or both? 🎯

Our highest conviction tier is the SUPER lock. We don't hand them out often.
Today there's exactly one.. ⚽
Croatia ML -130
• 4 proven soccer sharps backing it, only 2 against
• Highest model score on our board
• 6 units...our biggest stake of the day if nothing changes
Two more the sharps like at the moment.
⚽ Portugal ML -120 (2.5u)
⚾ Braves ML +112 (4u)
Always check the site for the full card before gametime, as sharp action does move late.
Which one's on your card? 🎯

Okay.. here are two high tier plays for tonight!
Let’s have a day, a few more locked in on the site.
Cubs/brewers under 7.5
Phillies -1.5

Haaland isn't starting. The sharp money was already gone. 🇫🇷
We locked France at -155. It's now -290....a +13.6% line beat before kickoff.
The tape:
• 13 sharp wallets · $1.27M · 99% on France
• One whale loaded 27× its normal size ($154.9K)
• Pinnacle ran from -265 to -290 chasing the play
France ML
Fading the sharps, or riding the bounce-back? 🎯

A soccer wallet that's up +$937K just bet 24× its normal size tonight.
Not a typo. 24×.
When this wallet sizes up like that, it hits 67% of the time....and tonight it's all over the late slate 👇
⚽ USA ML -105
$1.16M sharp money · 99% on the States · we beat the close by +3.1%
⚾️Astros/Tigers under 9.5
100% of the money · 2 proven winners · zero dissent
⚾ Yankees -1.5 +114
100% sharp · plus-money run line · zero dissent
$1.16M just slammed the States alone. The public has no idea yet.

We spent a week hunting the sharpest World Cup wallets.
Today they all fired at once. ⚽
Nearly $3M in tracked sharp money just hit the slate...and the same wallet (+$937K, +48% ROI in soccer) is loading up to 25× its normal size across three games.
The board they're hammering..
🇩🇪 Germany ML -110
14 wallets · $1.9M · we beat the close by +9.4%
🇯🇵 Japan ML -105 (SUPER PICK)
100% of the money · zero dissent · a 5-0 elite firing $160K
🇺🇸 USA ML -105
$708K · 100% sharp · zero dissent
A week of tracking, and today's the payoff.
Full board locks on the site before kickoff
Which flag are you riding? ⚽

Started 3-0 yesterday. Finished 3-3. 📒
Edge is still alive.. zoom out and the math still works..
• +6.93u last 7 days
• 18-13 (58.1%)
• Breakeven is 52.4%.
Today is a monster: afternoon MLB + World Cup, sharp money already moving..
We have 4 picks already locked in..
What are we hammering first today? ⚾⚽

🚨 One of the sharpest soccer wallets I track just bet 10.7× their normal size.
$60.6K on a single game. That wallet wins 71% when it loads up like this.
We're on it ....and it's the headliner of a massive slate. The full board 👇
⚽ Morocco ML -390 (4u)
6 sharp wallets · $72.4K · 100% of the money · zero dissent
⚾ Phillies/Nats Over 9.5 (3u)
A +$336K elite sharp · 100% of the money · no opposition
⚾ Mariners/Pirates Under 7.5 (4u)
Same elite sharp, doubling down on a second total
⚾ Braves ML -132 (3u)
4 proven winners · 89% of the sharp money
...and the Rockies Over already cashed ✅
Which one's your hammer tonight? 🎯

2 cashed.
+9.44u banked today.
3 still live. 1 lock left to go. 🔥
And we're up +39 units in June.
The last play before the night closes
⚾ Braves ML -132
• 4 proven sharps on it
• 89% of the sharp money
• Led by a +$336K winner
Every pick and every sharp wallet is on the site...in real time, before they lock.
Follow + get on the site
Tailing the last one with us, or watching? 🎯

⚾ Public money: 85% on the Red Sox....
Sharp money: 71% on the Rockies...
When the room splits like that, I want to know who's actually right. 👀
Rockies ML +145 (BetMGM)
The tape on Colorado
• Biggest position on the board $12.4K
• A 30-7 sharp (81% win rate, +41% ROI) on the dog too
• 2 proven MLB winners holding the line
But I'll take the dog the public forgot every time the sharps zag.
Tailing the Rockies, or trusting the chalk? 🎯

A sharp I track just bet 3× their normal size on TWO different games tonight. 🔒
That always gets my attention. Here's where the money's pointing 👇
⚾ Braves ML -108 (3u) 6 wallets · $40.1K · 100% of the sharp money on Atlanta — zero dissent. That wallet fired 3.3× here.
⚾ Orioles ML -133 (3u) 3 proven winners · $26K · 78% of the money. Same wallet, 3.2× its usual size — and it hits 65% when it loads up like this.
Two games. One sharp hammering both. First pitch in minutes.
Riding both, or just one? 🎯

Stop what you're doing and bookmark this. 📌
Following these sharp wallets the last 7 days has been a gold mine..
✅ +13.23u ✅ 20-12 · 62.5% ✅ +12.5% ROI
Here are the 3 they're loading tonight 👇
⚾ Brewers ML +101 (4u) 3 wallets · $12.5K · 82% of the sharp money.
⚾ Orioles ML -133 (3u) 3 proven winners — one just fired 3.2× their usual size ($11.9K). That wallet hits 65% when it pushes like that.
⚾ Over 9.5 Brewers/Reds (2.5u) The only total a +$329K trader touched all night.
Tell a friend. Then come back tomorrow and check the receipts.
Which one are you riding? 🎯

⚽ Sweden vs Japan
Soccer Fam!! What do we think?
One wallet. 5-0 in soccer. It has never lost when it sizes up.
It just put $97.7K on Japan at 2.3x its normal bet.
I'm not calling this a lock....it's a single sharp, not a consensus. But it's the one sharp I stop and look at... and the line is moving EARLY..
• Top 100 trader • 100% soccer win rate • +$982K lifetime P&L
Japan opened +105 at Pinnacle. It's already -111. The market is chasing them.
Fade the whale, or jump in? 👀
